## Meeting Purpose

[Daily CM standup to discuss progress, blockers, and align on content creation processes.](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Atlas AI tool is causing significant challenges; team is using alternative methods (ChatGPT, Claude) to meet deadlines](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Content creation process involves manual outlining and extensive editing due to AI limitations](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Team is balancing the need to use Atlas (for company tracking) with the necessity to deliver quality content to clients](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [New ticket creation system implemented for suggesting Atlas improvements directly to the tech team](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

## Topics

### Atlas AI Tool Challenges

  - [Saskia and Jessica experiencing significant issues with Atlas output quality and usability](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Atlas not following given templates or instructions effectively](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Team using ChatGPT and other AI tools to compensate for Atlas shortcomings](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Ehtisham created tickets for tech team to address Atlas problems](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Company expects continued use of Atlas despite issues, to gather feedback and improve the tool](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Saskia working on prophecy articles, completing 2 out of 5 so far](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Jessica focusing on maternity shoot ideas for Aftershoot client](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Manual outlining process due to Atlas limitations](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Team comparing Atlas and ChatGPT outputs to create best possible content](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Ehtisham handling final edits and customer communication](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)

### Workflow and Deadlines

  - [Team aiming to deliver 4-5 articles per week (Saskia) and 3-4 articles per week (Jessica)](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Word count target around 1,700-2,000 words per article](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Balancing Atlas usage with need to meet client deadlines and quality expectations](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Weekly editor's sheet to be filled out, including Atlas links for accountability](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)

### Client Communication and Feedback

  - [Aftershoot client approving outlines before full article creation](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Some delays in client feedback and article publishing noted](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Ehtisham to follow up with clients on pending approvals and publications](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)

### Team Expansion and Collaboration

  - [Daily standup meetings serving as team-building exercise for remote team](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Expectation of new writers joining the team soon](https://fathom.video/share/zP-QXxFKP176NWx74az_Yb5TPs3pSJxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
